title: katastello #2687
definition:
1) to send or put down, to lower
 2) to put or keep down one who is roused or incensed, to repress,
    restrain, appease, quiet
nasbUsage:

 2) to put or keep down one who is roused or incensed, to repress,
    restrain, appease, quiet
